sources.expression: $wpdb->get_results( "SELECT ID AS `value`, post_title AS `name` FROM {$wpdb->prefix}posts WHERE post_type IN (\"{$post_types}\") AND post_status IN('publish', 'future') ORDER BY post_title ASC", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_row(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"
					SELECT key_id, consumer_secret
					FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_api_keys
					WHERE consumer_key = %s
				",
				$consumer_key
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_row(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"
					SELECT key_id, description, truncated_key
					FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_api_keys
					WHERE key_id = %d
				",
				absint( $key_id )
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)

sinks.expression:
printf(
			'<button type="button" class="button optin-monster-insert-campaign-button" data-editor="%s" title="%s">%s %s</button>',
			esc_attr( $editor_id ),
			esc_attr__( 'Add OptinMonster', 'optin-monster-api' ),
			// phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped, unable to escape SVG.
			$icon,
			esc_html__( 'Add OptinMonster', 'optin-monster-api' )
		)

$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT ID AS `value`, post_title AS `name` FROM {$wpdb->prefix}posts WHERE post_type IN (\"{$post_types}\") AND post_status IN('publish', 'future') ORDER BY post_title ASC", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_row(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"
					SELECT key_id, consumer_secret
					FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_api_keys
					WHERE consumer_key = %s
				",
				$consumer_key
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_row(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"
					SELECT key_id, description, truncated_key
					FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_api_keys
					WHERE key_id = %d
				",
				absint( $key_id )
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)

printf( '

', esc_html__( 'Select and display your email marketing form or smart call-to-action campaign', 'optin-monster-api' ) )

printf( '

', esc_html__( 'Select a Click to Load Campaign to link.', 'optin-monster-api' ) )

sanitizers.expression: wp_kses_post( __( 'Instantly grow your email list, get more leads and increase sales with the #1 most powerful conversion optimization toolkit in the world.', 'optin-monster-api' ) )
esc_html( sprintf( __( 'OptinMonster requires WooCommerce %s or above.', 'optin-monster-api' ), OMAPI_WooCommerce::MINIMUM_VERSION ) )

$wpdb->prepare(
				"
					SELECT key_id, consumer_secret
					FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_api_keys
					WHERE consumer_key = %s
				",
				$consumer_key
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"
					SELECT key_id, description, truncated_key
					FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_api_keys
					WHERE key_id = %d
				",
				absint( $key_id )
			)

wp_kses( __( 'Please Note: Support for PHP 5.5 will be discontinued in 2020. After this, if no further action is taken, OptinMonster functionality will be disabled.', 'optin-monster-api' ), array( 'strong' => array(), 'em' => array(), ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Email is hands-down the most effective way to nurture leads and turn them into customers, with a return on investment (ROI) of $44 back for every $1 spent according to the Direct Marketing Association.', 'optin-monster-api' ), array( 'strong' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Email is still #1 - At least 91% of consumers check their email on a daily basis. You get direct access to your subscribers, without having to play by social media's rules and algorithms.', 'optin-monster-api' ), array( 'strong' => array() ) )
wp_kses( __( 'You own your email list - Unlike with social media, your list is your property and no one can revoke your access to it.', 'optin-monster-api' ), array( 'strong' => array() ) )
wp_kses( __( 'Email converts - People who buy products marketed through email spend 138% more than those who don't receive email offers.', 'optin-monster-api' ), array( 'strong' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Create Sales, Opt-In, Webinar, Thank You,
Coming Soon pages & more...', 'optin-monster-api' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )
